AccountQuotas.description: A list of AccountQuota objects. Within this list, each quota has a name, a count of usage toward the quota maximum, and a maximum value for the quota.

DefaultCertificateForNewLaunches.description: The default root CA for new databases created by your Amazon Web Services account. This is either the root CA override set on your Amazon Web Services account or the system default CA for the Region if no override exists. To override the default CA, use the ModifyCertificates operation.
